name: The Lone Seed
acquisitionSource: Clear Operation: Faded Legacy - Ch. 7 - Desire's Flow
descriptionTemplate: Choose a non-Derived Command Card in hand and create a Basic Copy of it. The copy has {Exhaust}. Grant its Awakener [Arg1] Aliemus.
lore:
She will pass the Lone Seed to your tongue.
The strength of blood, the faith of inheritance, the courage to transcend, and deep affection... she entrusts everything to you.
